  "findings": [
    "Vacuum decay test failed: system unable to hold target micron level.",
    "Indicates potential leaks, moisture, or non-condensables in the system.",
    "Non-compliance with EPA 608 evacuation requirements and manufacturer specifications."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate system and locate leak(s) using nitrogen and trace gas or electronic leak detector.",
    "Repair leak(s) and re-evacuate to manufacturer-specified micron level.",
    "Perform a successful standing vacuum decay test before charging."
  ],
  "rationale": "A failed vacuum decay test at rough-complete stage means the system does not meet the required evacuation standards per EPA 608 and manufacturer specs. Charging a leaking or moisture-laden system risks compressor damage, refrigerant loss, and violates environmental regulations.",

    "EPA 608 evacuation requirements",
    "ACCA Standard 5 (HVAC Quality Installation Specification)",
    "Manufacturer installation/service manual"
  ]
